subcodes.first_line: O Shukru'llah! Thy letter reached the Most Great Prison and was read before the Wronged One. Praise be to God for His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شکرالله نامه ات در سجن اعظم وارد و لدی المظلوم قرائت شد الحمد لله از عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @thankfulness; gratitude
